Original: Oh, someone famous is visiting us!

Original: Wow, I never thought you'd come here!

Original: I'm sure you'll get even more famous. And so will I! Well, I am married to you!
Tradução: Tenho certeza de que você ficará ainda mais famoso(a). E eu também! Bem, eu sou casado(a) com você!

Original: I'm sure you'll get even more famous. And so will I! Well, I am married to you!

Original: I'm sure you'll get even more famous. And so will I! Well, I am married to you!

Original: When you're really famous everyone will have to treat me like a princess. Oh, yes.

Original: Keep working on that fame, dear. I want you to be out-of-this-world famous.

Original: Excuse me. How did you get so ugly?

Original: Keep working on that fame, dear. I want you to be out-of-this-world famous.

Original: I'm sure you'll get even more famous. And so will I! Well, I am married to you!

Original: I'm sure you'll get even more famous. And so will I! Well, I am married to you!

Original: All my friends have heard of you. Soon, all the world will know who you are.
Tradução: Todos os meus amigos já ouviram falar de você. Em breve, o mundo inteiro saberá quem você é.

Original: Yuck! Are you a monster?

Original: I bet people laugh at you for being so ugly.

Original: That looks like an incredible weapon for someone like you.

Original: Wow, that's an incredibly powerful weapon you've got there!

Original: Don't worry, ugly is really in this season.

Original: I'm not sure I can keep my lunch down with you around.

Original: Must you continue to show that face in front of decent people?

Original: So, you a Hero or a deformed monster?

Original: I feel queasy just looking at you.
Tradução: Só de olhar para você, já me dá náuseas.

Original: Can't believe I'm married to such an eyesore.

Original: Woah! That is hideous with a capital Ewwww!

Original: I've never seen anything quite so ugly as you.

Tradução: Uma feiura dessas não deveria passar despercebida. É verdadeiramente histórico.

Original: That is hideous with a capital Ewwww!

Original: You're the ugliest thing my eyes have ever had to put up with.

Original: Bleurgh! You look like a butt!
